source_note: Keeper Rulebook Investigator Development Phase (pp.94-95): skill ticks and improvement rolls are the mechanism by which investigators advance between sessions.

tick.source_note: Keeper Rulebook pp.94-95: a skill earns one tick for each regular, hard, or extreme success rolled during play. Bonus-die-only successes, opposed-roll losers, and combined-roll participants do not earn ticks.

improvement_roll.source_note: Keeper Rulebook p.95: for each skill with at least one tick, roll 1D100 during the development phase. If the result is higher than the current skill, the skill increases by 1D10. Skills raised to 90% or above via a Sanity reward may not be improved further by development.

sanity_reward.source_note: Keeper Rulebook p.95: when a skill reaches 90% or above as the result of a development improvement roll, the investigator gains 2D6 Sanity points (up to their maximum Sanity).
